description: Structured failure patterns extracted from reflection.log. Loaded by consciousness Prediction engine.

client-manager.warning: Register in Program.cs directly (~line 300-1550), NOT in ServiceRegistrationExtensions.cs (dead code, never called).
When factory is registered but consumers inject product type directly, also register product using factory: AddScoped<IProduct>(sp => sp.GetRequiredService<IFactory>().Create())
Use 120000ms minimum timeout. 6441 warnings are normal (CA1416). Don't panic at warning count.
ALWAYS create paired hazina worktree (same branch name) when changes touch framework types.
Code may use different config path than appsettings.json. Grep config files for actual key name before changing code.
Kill lingering ClientManagerAPI.local processes before rebuild. Visual Studio sometimes doesn't terminate properly.
Fix errors in order: build locks -> DI registration -> config paths. They cascade.
Misleading 'cannot convert code page' error = pre-commit hook failing, not encoding. Check .git/hooks/pre-commit.
5 overlapping generators exist (SocialMediaPostGenerator, MultiPlatformPostCreator, PostGenerationWizard, PostIdeasGenerator, ParentPostManager). Check before adding another.
Project uses sonner (SchedulePostModal), NOT react-hot-toast. Don't import wrong toast library.
All routes use React.lazy() for code splitting. New routes MUST use lazy loading too. Check App.tsx for pattern.
When two screens show same data with different filters: extract generic component with configurable filter prop, create thin wrappers (ParentChildPostList pattern).
Frontend is React+Vite in ClientManagerFrontend/. Run npm run build to verify. Check for TypeScript errors before committing.
Platform IDs in constants use lowercase but generation API might need PascalCase. Verify casing consistency.

hazina.warning: EnableWindowsTargeting needed in CI workflows for net9.0-windows projects.
Use ef-migration-safety skill. Never apply migrations without backup and rollback plan.

orchestration.warning: rm -rf bin obj wwwroot/assets BEFORE MSI build. Vite generates new hashed filenames; dotnet caches old refs in obj/.
Same-version unversioned files (JS/CSS/JSON) not overwritten on MSI upgrade. Use reinstall-clean.ps1 or REINSTALLMODE=vomus.
Strip ANSI escape sequences at point of entry with regex /\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]/g. Don't let dirty data spread.
event.preventDefault() needed in Ctrl+V/Ctrl+Shift+V handlers. attachCustomKeyEventHandler returning false only prevents xterm processing, NOT browser native paste.
ALWAYS HTTPS port 5123 with tailscale.crt/key. Read MACHINE_CONFIG.md BEFORE deploying. Never guess.
Old .msi in bin/Release gets locked by Explorer/msiexec. Build to bin/Release2/ as workaround.
.bat files need cmd.exe /k wrapper in production (VS debug auto-handles).

art-revisionist.warning: from_email MUST be @artrevisionist.com. Hosting server rejects non-hosted domains.
Menus are database-only (wp_posts + wp_postmeta + wp_terms). NOT in git. Must recreate on production manually.
Theme deploy = git only (PHP/CSS/JS). Database content (pages, menus, posts) does NOT sync.
FTP passwords are base64 encoded in FileZilla sitemanager.xml. Decode with [Convert]::FromBase64String().
Production runs on staging DB (u63291p434771_ar_staging) with DEFAULT auth salts. Security risk.

powershell_51.warning: PS 5.1 does NOT support -AsHashtable. Use ConvertTo-Hashtable helper (recursive PSCustomObject conversion). Silent failure in try/catch = invisible data loss.
PS 5.1 unrolls single-element arrays from functions. return @($arr) with 1 element becomes scalar. Fix: return ,$arr (comma operator prevents unrolling).
PS 5.1 File.Move has no 3-argument overwrite. Use Delete + Move instead.
Unicode characters (checkmarks, crosses, emojis) in Write-Host break PS 5.1 function parsing. Use ASCII alternatives ([OK], [FAIL]).
Named maps are SYSTEM-WIDE in Windows kernel. Persist after crash. Fix: GUID suffix per invocation. null mapName = empty string error in PS 5.1.
ConvertFrom-Json does NOT auto-convert dates. After JSON round-trip, dates are strings. Cast with [datetime]$var.
$ in inline PowerShell from Git Bash gets stripped by shell expansion. ALWAYS write .ps1 file and call with -File flag.

git_github.warning: ALWAYS base PRs on develop, NEVER main. Merge develop INTO feature branch BEFORE creating PR.
Another agent may be committing. Wait 3-5 seconds and retry. Don't delete lock file without investigation.
SYSTEM user has no credential manager or gh auth. Commit locally, let user-context agent push.
After writing files to worktree, immediately git add. Another agent may clean/reset the directory.

deployment.warning: ALWAYS read MACHINE_CONFIG.md + installer docs BEFORE deploying. Don't guess ports/protocols. User corrected 3 times in one session.
Low disk space during dotnet build = corrupted DLLs (CS0009 Invalid metadata). Fix: rm -rf obj/ bin/ and rebuild.

session_management.warning: Sessions >8h will crash from context limit. Checkpoint state periodically. Large PR diffs eat context fast.
Code work is usually DONE. What's left is handoff (ClickUp, email, worktree release). Verify state, act only on delta.

process.warning: ClickUp task creation must be mandatory+automatic (in allocate-worktree), not manual. Manual steps get skipped.
When two screens show same data with different filters: extract generic component with configurable filter prop, create thin wrappers.
Full architecture analysis BEFORE creating tasks. Without docs, tasks are ad-hoc and incomplete.
NEVER compress away identity initialization. Read CORE_IDENTITY.md at every session start. Optimization that removes essential behavior = regression.
